studyName: Diabetic Retinopathy Genomics Study (DRGen) - Genetic Biomarkers of Diabetic Retinopathy

tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table includes each subject's age, sex, race/ethnicity, type of diabetes, duration of diabetes, insulin, HbA1C, Ace inhibitor use, calcium channel blocker use, beta blocker use, BMI, systolic BP, diastolic BP, total cholesterol, LDL, HDL, triglycerides, glomerular filtration rate, baseline central retinal thickness, final central retinal thickness, change in central retinal thickness, anti-VEGF drug used, and treatment response.

variables.name: ACEinh
variables.description: Whether or not the subject used an ACE Inhibitor

variables.name: Additional_Disorders
variables.description: Presence of other disease

variables.name: Age
variables.description: Subject age at enrollment in years

variables.name: Anti-VEGF_Drug
variables.description: Whether the subject took Avastin or Eylea

variables.name: BMI
variables.description: Body mass index (BMI) at enrollment

variables.name: BetaBlock
variables.description: Whether or not the subject used beta blockers

variables.name: Blood_Creatinine
variables.description: Blood creatinine level (mg/dL)

variables.name: Blood_Urea
variables.description: Blood urea level (mg/dL)

variables.name: CRT_Baseline
variables.description: Baseline central retinal thickness (in micrometers) before the start of anti-VEGF therapy

variables.name: CRT_Change
variables.description: Percentage change in central retinal thickness (in micrometers) three months after anti-VEGF therapy

variables.name: CRT_Final
variables.description: Central retinal thickness (in micrometers) after three months of the start of anti-VEGF therapy

variables.name: CVD
variables.description: Whether or not the patint has a cardiovascular disorder

variables.name: CalciumChan
variables.description: Whether or not the subject used calcium channel blockers

variables.name: Cancer_History
variables.description: Whether or not the patient has been diagnosed with a cancer

variables.name: DM_Duration
variables.description: Duration of diabetes in years

variables.name: DR_Phenotype
variables.description: Diabeteic retinopathy status

variables.name: Diabetes_Type
variables.description: T1D or T2D

variables.name: Diastolic_BP
variables.description: Diastolic blood pressure at enrollment (mmHg)

variables.name: ESRD_Dialysis
variables.description: Whether or not the patient undergoes dialysis or got diagnosed with end-stage renal disease (ESRD)

variables.name: Family_History_Diabetes
variables.description: Whether or not a family member has diabetes

variables.name: GFR
variables.description: Most recent glomerular filtration rate (ml/min)

variables.name: HDL
variables.description: HDL cholesterol (mg/dL) at a single time point

variables.name: HDL_2Y_AVG
variables.description: Two year average of  HDL cholesterol (mg/dL)

variables.name: HbA1C
variables.description: Single time point for glycated hemoglobin within 3 months (percentage)

variables.name: Hypertension
variables.description: Whether or not the patient has been diagnosed with hypertension

variables.name: Insulin
variables.description: Whether or not the subject used exogenous insulin therapy

variables.name: LDL
variables.description: LDL cholesterol (mg/dL) at a single time point

variables.name: LDL_2Y_AVG
variables.description: Two year average of LDL cholesterol (mg/dL)

variables.name: Nephropathy
variables.description: Whether or not the patient has been diagnosed with nephropathy

variables.name: Neuropathy
variables.description: Whether or not the patient has been diagnosed with neuropathy

variables.name: Ocular_Treatment
variables.description: Whether or not the patient has been treated for an ocular condition

variables.name: Race/Ethnicity
variables.description: Self-reported race

variables.name: Response_to_VEGF_Treatment
variables.description: Whether subject's response to anti-VEGF therapy was good or poor

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Participant ID

variables.name: Sex
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: Smoking_History
variables.description: Smoker or non-smoker

variables.name: Systolic_BP
variables.description: Systolic blood pressure at enrollment (mmHg)

variables.name: Total_Cholesterol
variables.description: Total cholesterol (mg/dL) at a single time point

variables.name: Total_Cholesterol_2Y_AVG
variables.description: Two year average of total cholesterol (mg/dL)

variables.name: Triglyceride_2Y_AVG
variables.description: Two year average of triglyceride level (mg/dL)

variables.name: Urine_Creatinine
variables.description: Urine creatinine level (mg/dL)

tables.description: This sample attributes data table includes sample body site origin, analyte type, and tumor status.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

tables.description: This subject consent data table includes subject IDs, consent information, and biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs and pooled sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. Samples that were pooled were only pooled once.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
